nodes.context: Irish-Canadian organized crime group in Montreal, involved in bank robbery, drug trafficking, and port control.
Colombian drug cartel that partnered with the West End Gang to smuggle cocaine into Canada.
Montreal Mafia family involved in joint bank robbery with West End Gang in 1958.
Italian organized crime group in Montreal, part of the Consortium with West End Gang and Hells Angels.
Italian-American organized crime network with ties to West End Gang.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Montreal, part of the Consortium and involved in contract killings for West End Gang.
Italian-Canadian Mafia family based in Montreal, involved in drug trafficking and other organized crime.
Criminal alliance involving multiple groups, including the West End Gang, for drug trafficking.
Mexican drug cartel, one of the most powerful in the world, involved in cocaine smuggling.
Italian-Canadian Mafia family based in Montreal, predecessor to the Rizzuto family.
Outlaw motorcycle club based in Canada, rival to Hells Angels.
Irish republican paramilitary group, involved in arms smuggling and other criminal activities.

edges.context: West End Gang formed a partnership with a Florida-based cell of the Cali Cartel to smuggle cocaine into Canada.
West End Gang and Cotroni family jointly committed the largest bank robbery in Canadian history in 1958.
West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, and Hells Angels form the Consortium to fix drug prices.
West End Gang formulated ties to Cosa Nostra as part of its international connections.
West End Gang and Hells Angels are part of the Consortium; Hells Angels hitman killed for West End Gang.
The West End Gang collaborated with the Rizzuto crime family on drug shipments, but had a dispute over a cocaine shipment in 2005-2006.
Shane Maloney was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance, which involved the West End Gang.
Shane Maloney transferred his loyalty to help the Sinaloa Cartel smuggle cocaine into Ontario.
The West End Gang was allied with the Cotroni crime family, as listed in the infobox.
The West End Gang was allied with the Rock Machine MC, as listed in the infobox.
The West End Gang was allied with the Provisional IRA, as listed in the infobox.
